prompt.content: Using the SQLite tables subscribers, subscriber_plans, subscription_plans, data_usage_daily, and roaming_sessions, analyze 2025 to see whether having hotspot included is associated with heavier day to day usage and overage behavior. Build the dataset at the subscriber-day level from data_usage_daily, keeping only days where data consumed > 0 mb, and only subscribers with active accounts and credit score >= 700. For each subscriber-day, attach the single plan that is active on that day by requiring activation date <= usage date and (contract_end_date is NULL/blank OR contract_end_date >= usage date), and if multiple plans qualify choose the one with the most recent activation date. Also ensure the plan definition in subscription_plans is valid on that day using effective date <= usage date and (end date is NULL/blank OR end date >= usage date). Exclude any subscriber-day that falls within a roaming session window for that subscriber (usage date between start date and end date in roaming_sessions). Finally, split results by whether the active plan has hotspot_included = 1 vs 0, and return these outputs (rounded to 2 decimals): average data consumed in mb per day (hotspot vs no hotspot), percent of days with overage mb > 0 (hotspot vs no hotspot), and average overage mb on overage days only (hotspot vs no hotspot).

rubrics.name: Reports the average daily mb for hotspot included plans as 3532.11 (+/- 0.05). (ver_c62984bee7914b39b85ba3681410725b)

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
plan_type  avg_daily_mb  percent_overage_days  avg_overage_mb_on_overage_days 
0  Hotspot Included       3532.11                  1.11                          11213.50  
1        No Hotspot       3125.81                  1.56                             9863.04                          

```
WITH daily_usage AS (
  SELECT
    d.subscriber_id,
    DATE(d.usage_date) AS usage_date,
    SUM(d.data_consumed_mb) AS data_consumed_mb,
    SUM(d.overage_mb) AS overage_mb
  FROM data_usage_daily d
  WHERE DATE(d.usage_date) >= DATE('2025-01-01')
    AND DATE(d.usage_date) <  DATE('2026-01-01')
    AND d.data_consumed_mb > 0
  GROUP BY d.subscriber_id, DATE(d.usage_date)
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    du.*
  FROM daily_usage du
  JOIN subscribers s
    ON s.subscriber_id = du.subscriber_id
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(s.account_status)) = 'active'
    AND CAST(s.credit_score AS REAL) >= 700
),
ranked_subscriber_plans AS (
  SELECT
    b.subscriber_id,
    b.usage_date,
    b.data_consumed_mb,
    b.overage_mb,
    sp.plan_id,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY b.subscriber_id, b.usage_date
      ORDER BY DATE(sp.activation_date) DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM base b
  JOIN subscriber_plans sp
    ON sp.subscriber_id = b.subscriber_id
   AND DATE(sp.activation_date) <= b.usage_date
   AND (
     NULLIF(TRIM(sp.contract_end_date), '') IS NULL
     OR DATE(sp.contract_end_date) >= b.usage_date
   )
),
active_plan AS (
  SELECT
    subscriber_id,
    usage_date,
    data_consumed_mb,
    overage_mb,
    plan_id
  FROM ranked_subscriber_plans
  WHERE rn = 1
),
ranked_plan_defs AS (
  SELECT
    ap.subscriber_id,
    ap.usage_date,
    ap.data_consumed_mb,
    ap.overage_mb,
    p.hotspot_included,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY ap.subscriber_id, ap.usage_date
      ORDER BY DATE(p.effective_date) DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM active_plan ap
  JOIN subscription_plans p
    ON p.plan_id = ap.plan_id
   AND DATE(p.effective_date) <= ap.usage_date
   AND (
     NULLIF(TRIM(p.end_date), '') IS NULL
     OR DATE(p.end_date) >= ap.usage_date
   )
),
plan_def AS (
  SELECT
    subscriber_id,
    usage_date,
    data_consumed_mb,
    overage_mb,
    hotspot_included
  FROM ranked_plan_defs
  WHERE rn = 1
),
non_roaming AS (
  SELECT
    pd.*
  FROM plan_def pd
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM roaming_sessions r
    WHERE r.subscriber_id = pd.subscriber_id
      AND DATE(r.start_date) <= pd.usage_date
      AND (
        NULLIF(TRIM(r.end_date), '') IS NULL
        OR DATE(r.end_date) >= pd.usage_date
      )
  )
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(CAST(hotspot_included AS TEXT))) IN ('true','1') THEN 'Hotspot Included'
    ELSE 'No Hotspot'
  END AS plan_type,
  ROUND(AVG(data_consumed_mb), 2) AS avg_daily_mb,
  ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN overage_mb > 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 2) AS percent_overage_days,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN overage_mb > 0 THEN overage_mb END), 2) AS avg_overage_mb_on_overage_days
FROM non_roaming
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN LOWER(TRIM(CAST(hotspot_included AS TEXT))) IN ('true','1') THEN 'Hotspot Included'
    ELSE 'No Hotspot'
  END
ORDER BY plan_type;
```
